---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.

**Is this related to a specific V-Model phase?**
- [ ] Requirements (Phase 1)
- [ ] Acceptance Testing (Phase 1)
- [ ] Traceability Matrix
- [ ] System Design / System Testing (Phase 2 — future)
- [ ] Architecture / Integration Testing (Phase 3 — future)
- [ ] Module Design / Unit Testing (Phase 4 — future)
- [ ] Implementation with gating (Phase 5 — future)
- [ ] Other

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Include:

- **What** the feature does
- **Where** it fits in the workflow (new command, script enhancement, template change, etc.)
- **Why** it matters (use case, regulatory requirement, workflow improvement)

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Regulatory Context (if applicable)

If this feature supports a specific regulatory standard, mention it:
- [ ] IEC 62304 (Medical Devices)
- [ ] ISO 26262 (Automotive)
- [ ] DO-178C (Aviation)
- [ ] FDA 21 CFR Part 820
- [ ] IEC 61508 (Industrial Safety)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.
